name: Fresh Fruity Mint Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1 medium-sized tart apple, peeled, cored and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the container of an electric blender.
2. Blend at high speed until you have a smooth paste.
3. Serve with almost any meal or enjoy every bite of the main dish.
6 servings
